title: Telkur Station Cantina
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Telkur Station Cantina''' was a seedy [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]<ref name="LOTF3">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref> on the [[Telkur Station]].

==Description==
The cantina was a place illuminated by dim blue lightning and filled with the sweet taint of [[Rekka]] smoke hanging in the air. The discreet entrance was half-concealed somewhere along the establishment's eight walls. The room's only ceiling was a disorganized web of ventilation ducts.<ref name="LOTF3" />

The place featured a filthy bar whose [[Hapan]] barkeepers handed out datapads with drink recipes featuring beverages like the [[Red Cloud]] and the flat-tasting [[Gizer ale|Gizer Ale]], which were both served in mugs to guests.<ref name="LOTF3" />

The cantina's clients were exclusively [[Human/Legends|Human]] and [[Near-Human]] who sat clustered in groups of three or four around corroded, rust-stained [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] tables. The male patrons were handsome but scroungy looking with three-day beards, whereas the Hapan women dressed to look tough and available. The pirate station used to be a prominent hotspot for outlawed ships to pick up supplies because the place was not on the radar of [[Hapan Security]].<ref name="LOTF3" />

Although weapons were permitted, [[Droid/Legends|droids]] had to stay outside. The cantina also refrained from using any bartending or surveillance droids for business.<ref name="LOTF3" />

{{Struct-stub}}

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
